seoTitle: Eleebana vs Elizabeth Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Eleebana and Elizabeth Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Eleebana vs Elizabeth Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Eleebana and Elizabeth Bay.
heading: Eleebana vs Elizabeth Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Eleebana, New South Wales and Elizabeth Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Elizabeth Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Eleebana (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Eleebana or Elizabeth Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Eleebana has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Elizabeth Bay scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Eleebana scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Elizabeth Bay scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Eleebana or Elizabeth Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Elizabeth Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
